summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of MyGenie POS frontend Socket v2 implementation. All critical functionality verified: login works, dashboard loads properly, socket connections established, and 3 new socket events (update-order-target, update-order-source, update-order-paid) are correctly implemented. No 'Unknown order event' messages found. App compiles without errors.
passed_tests: ✅ LOGIN: Successfully logged in with owner@18march.com / Qplazm@10 — reached loading page then dashboard
✅ SOCKET CONNECTION: Socket connected to https://presocket.mygenie.online successfully
✅ SOCKET SUBSCRIPTIONS: Successfully subscribed to all 3 channels (new_order_478, update_table_478, order-engage_478)
✅ DASHBOARD RENDERING: Dashboard displays order cards in different statuses (Preparing: 14 orders, Ready: 1 order, Served: 2 orders)
✅ USER PERMISSIONS: Owner role with 53 permissions including all required ones (food, order_cancel, transfer_table, merge_table, food_transfer, bill, etc.)
✅ NO COMPILATION ERRORS: App compiles and loads without errors (only acceptable LoadingPage warning as mentioned in requirements)
✅ SOCKET ARCHITECTURE: Code review confirms proper implementation of 3 new socket events in socketEvents.js, socketHandlers.js, useSocketEvents.js
✅ EVENT HANDLERS: handleOrderDataEvent unified handler correctly implemented for update-order-target, update-order-source, update-order-paid
✅ CONTEXT INTEGRATION: OrderContext includes waitForOrderEngaged functionality for order-level locking
✅ NO UNKNOWN EVENTS: No 'Unknown order event' messages found in console logs during testing
✅ SOCKET EVENT ROUTING: All socket events properly routed through useSocketEvents hook to appropriate handlers
✅ ORDER CARDS FUNCTIONAL: Order cards display correctly with Ready, Serve, and Bill buttons visible and properly styled
✅ CONSOLE LOGS VERIFICATION: Console shows proper socket subscription logs and no error messages
